svg.title: Central Memory Architecture for AI Agents
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing a central memory hub with RAG + MCP layers, local and cloud sync, and connections to multiple AI agents

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Claude Code connect to the memory MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does Cursor connect to the memory MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does Codex connect to the memory MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini connect to the memory MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does GPT connect to the memory MCP?')
sendPrompt('How do web-based agents connect to memory?')

g.text: Exposes tools: get_context · update_memory · search_rag · list_files
Query router · RAG index · Context assembler

g.text: Local markdown / JSON files · Vector DB (ChromaDB / Qdrant) · SQLite metadata
Git-tracked local ←→ Cloud (GitHub / S3 / Supabase) · Runs on save or git commit
